body: Excited to announce our new program aimed at providing resources and support for the LGBTQ+ community on campus! Together, we can create a more inclusive environment. #SupportLGBTQ #InclusionMatters
Thrilled to share that we raised $5,000 for the Black Student Union! Thank you to everyone who contributed. Let’s keep pushing for equity on campus! #BSU #EquityForAll
Join us for a workshop on mental health resources for immigrant students. We need to ensure everyone feels safe and supported! #MentalHealthMatters #SupportImmigrants
